caption: A group of men, many wearing dark suits, face masks, and some in athletic wear, walk through a concrete tunnel-like area toward a large bus. The bus features a "Real Madrid" logo and a circular crest on its front. In the early sequence, a man in a grey t-shirt and black pants walks past a security guard in a high-visibility yellow vest. As the scene progresses, the group continues moving forward, with several men in suits and black face masks leading the way. A man in a grey t-shirt, seen from behind in the beginning, moves further into the frame and then exits to the right. The setting is a brightly lit passage with red structural pillars. By the end of the clip, the men have advanced toward the bus, maintaining a steady pace as they navigate the corridor.
